name: aggregator: --emit-output-hash produces a stable sha256 across identical runs (used by §2.7 quality_standards_directory_hash)
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && h1=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-output-hash 2>&1 | tail -1) && h2=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-output-hash 2>&1 | tail -1) && [ "$h1" = "$h2" ] && [ -n "$h1" ] && echo "ok hash=$h1" 1>&2
